mapper.select: SELECT c.brd_cmt_idx AS idx, c.brd_cmt_uuid AS uuid, c.brd_pst_idx, c.prnt_brd_cmt_idx, pc.brd_cmt_uuid AS prnt_brd_cmt_uuid, c.mbr_acct_idx, c.cntnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, c.created_by, c.updated_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.del_at FROM tb_brd_cmt c LEFT JOIN tb_brd_cmt pc ON pc.brd_cmt_idx = c.prnt_brd_cmt_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = c.mbr_acct_idx WHERE c.brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.brd_cmt_idx ASC

SELECT c.brd_cmt_idx AS idx, c.brd_cmt_uuid AS uuid, c.brd_pst_idx, c.prnt_brd_cmt_idx, pc.brd_cmt_uuid AS prnt_brd_cmt_uuid, c.mbr_acct_idx, c.cntnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, c.created_by, c.updated_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.del_at FROM tb_brd_cmt c LEFT JOIN tb_brd_cmt pc ON pc.brd_cmt_idx = c.prnt_brd_cmt_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = c.mbr_acct_idx WHERE c.brd_cmt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)

SELECT c.brd_cmt_idx AS idx, c.brd_cmt_uuid AS uuid, c.brd_pst_idx, c.prnt_brd_cmt_idx, pc.brd_cmt_uuid AS prnt_brd_cmt_uuid, c.mbr_acct_idx, c.cntnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, c.created_by, c.updated_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.del_at FROM tb_brd_cmt c LEFT JOIN tb_brd_cmt pc ON pc.brd_cmt_idx = c.prnt_brd_cmt_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = c.mbr_acct_idx WHERE c.brd_cmt_idx = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_brd_cmt ( brd_pst_idx, prnt_brd_cmt_idx, mbr_acct_idx, cntnt, created_by ) VALUES ( #{brdPstIdx}, #{prntBrdCmtIdx}, #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{cntnt}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_brd_cmt SET cntnt = #{cntnt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE brd_cmt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_brd_cmt SET del_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE brd_cmt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_cmt WHERE brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
